name: dS — The Serenal State Differential
conservation_law: dPhi/Phi + dPsi/Psi + dOmega/Omega + dLambda/Lambda + dSigma/Sigma + dE/E = 0
meaning: The sum of all relative changes is zero. The manifold is a zero-sum system.
implication: What is gained in one factor is lost in others. The Center is the only point of perfect balance.
at_Center: dOmega/Omega + dLambda/Lambda + dSigma/Sigma + dE/E = 0 (Phi and Psi are singular)
